recommendations.title: Intolerance: Love's Struggle Throughout the Ages
recommendations.overview: The story of a poor young woman, separated by prejudice from her husband and baby, is interwoven with tales of intolerance from throughout history.

recommendations.title: Broken Blossoms or The Yellow Man and the Girl
recommendations.overview: The love story of an abused English girl and a Chinese Buddhist in a time when London was a brutal and harsh place to live.

recommendations.title: The Musketeers of Pig Alley
recommendations.overview: A man recognizes the thief who had previously robbed him as one of the men involved in an unrelated mob shootout.

recommendations.title: Way Down East
recommendations.overview: A naive country girl is tricked into a sham marriage by a wealthy womanizer, then must rebuild her life despite the taint of having borne a child out of wedlock.

recommendations.title: Hacksaw Ridge
recommendations.overview: WWII American Army Medic Desmond T. Doss, who served during the Battle of Okinawa, refuses to kill people and becomes the first Conscientious Objector in American history to receive the Congressional Medal of Honor.

recommendations.title: A Corner in Wheat
recommendations.overview: On a whim, a greedy tycoon decides to corner the world market in wheat. This doubles the price of bread, forcing grain producers into charity lines and others further into poverty. The film contrasts the differences between the lives of those who wor

recommendations.title: Red Tails
recommendations.overview: The story of the Tuskegee Airmen, the first African-American pilots to fly in a combat squadron during World War II.

recommendations.title: The Last of the Mohicans
recommendations.overview: In war-torn colonial America, in the midst of a bloody battle between British, the French and Native American allies, the aristocratic daughter of a British Colonel and her party are captured by a group of Huron warriors. Fortunately, a group of thre

recommendations.title: Prayers for Bobby
recommendations.overview: Bobby Griffith was his mother's favorite son, the perfect all-American boy growing up under deeply religious influences in Walnut Creek, California. Bobby was also gay. Struggling with a conflict no one knew of, much less understood, Bobby finally ca

recommendations.title: Broken
recommendations.overview: Three suburban English families' lives intertwine with tragic consequences.
